longDescriptionKey: The Alliance Raines-class is a solid all-around warship, boasting 4 mount points and a generous swath of internal modules and compartments. In terms of overall performance, the Raines has moderate armoring, speed, and agility, while being able to function as a jack-of-trades warship.
name: Raines Frigate

longDescriptionKey: A large bulk cargo carrier with no weapons.
name: Bulk Hauler
